claimBoundary: Partial executed baseline metrics only. This does not close the external-method baseline gate until COLMAP/NeRF/2DGS/ray-traced-GS metrics are added on the same split.

3dgs.label: executed fixed-Gaussian / gsplat-control arm
3dgs.notes: Local executed Gaussian-control metric; broader official 3DGS and cross-method table still required for paper claim.

3dgs_smoke.label: fresh same-split gsplat 3DGS smoke
3dgs_smoke.notes: Fresh CUDA smoke proves the runner executes on local COLMAP + held-out split. It is intentionally not a quality baseline because it used one training iteration.

nextSteps: run/import COLMAP textured-mesh renders on the same held-out views

run/import official 2DGS renders on the same held-out views
